title: Pony
effect: A smaller type of horse, suitable for pulling a cart, carrying smaller loads than a full-sized horse, or serving as a mount for a smaller-than-human creature such as a dwarf or halfling. Riding horse: A horse trained for riding and able to carry a typical adult human. Riding horses tend to panic in combat.
